mapper.select:
SELECT id, id_location_code AS idLocationCode, id_location_name AS idLocationName, id_location_inner_code AS idLocationInnerCode, location_type AS locationType, id_location_category AS idLocationCategory, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM id_location
AND id_location_code = #{idLocationCode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO id_location
id_location_code, id_location_name, id_location_inner_code, location_type, id_location_category, creator_username, creator_name, created_at,
#{idLocationCode}, #{idLocationName}, #{idLocationInnerCode}, #{locationType}, #{idLocationCategory}, #{creatorUsername}, #{creatorName}, #{createdAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT id, id_location_code AS idLocationCode, id_location_name AS idLocationName, id_location_inner_code AS idLocationInnerCode, location_type AS locationType, id_location_category AS idLocationCategory, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM id_location WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_username = #{creatorUsername}

SELECT id, id_location_code AS idLocationCode, id_location_name AS idLocationName, id_location_inner_code AS idLocationInnerCode, location_type AS locationType, id_location_category AS idLocationCategory, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM id_location
AND creator_username = #{creatorUsername}
AND id_location_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idLocationCode}, '%')
AND id_location_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idLocationName}, '%')
AND id_location_inner_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idLocationInnerCode}, '%')
AND location_type = #{locationType}
AND id_location_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idLocationCategory}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, id_location_code AS idLocationCode, id_location_name AS idLocationName, id_location_inner_code AS idLocationInnerCode, location_type AS locationType, id_location_category AS idLocationCategory, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM id_location WHERE id_location_code = #{idLocationCode} AND creator_username = #{creatorUsername} LIMIT 1
